LightningComponentBundle.description: Branded hero banner for the Electra Warranty Portal. Headline, supporting copy, two CTAs, key stats.

property.name: headline
property.default: Submit a warranty claim in under 2 minutes.
property.label: Headline

property.name: subheadline
property.default: ARIA, our AI-powered service writer, walks you through every prior-authorization request — VIN to verdict — without a single email.
property.label: Subheadline
